metadata.title: Yandex Other-Day Delivery API
metadata.description: API for creating and managing other-day delivery orders

authentication.invalidation_condition: When personal account password is changed

format_switch.name: send_unix
format_switch.description: Time format in which the API returns delivery intervals (true — UNIX integer, false — UTC string)

term.name: Offer
term.definition: A delivery option or route selected based on the given order parameters

term.name: Order
term.definition: A completed delivery assignment containing information required for service provision (sender, list of services, recipient, shipment, etc.)

term.name: Label
term.definition: An accompanying document — a sticker on the shipment with sender and recipient info, tracking number, weight, delivery method, and barcode

term.name: Handover Act
term.definition: An accompanying document confirming the transfer of goods during order pickup

value.name: postpay
value.description: Card payment via GO app or SMS link

value.name: market_l4g
value.description: Yandex Market and partner pickup points

value.name: EXTRA_RESCHEDULING
value.description: Order cancelled due to frequent rescheduling

value.name: DIMENSIONS_EXCEEDED
value.description: Package too large for delivery method

value.name: PICKUP_EXPIRED
value.description: Storage period at pickup point expired

value.name: LAST_MILE_CHANGED_BY_USER
value.description: Last mile changed by user initiative

model.name: TimeIntervalUTC
model.note: Field types depend on the send_unix query parameter: when send_unix=true — integer (UNIX), otherwise — string (UTC)

field.name: from
field.description: Interval lower bound (UNIX timestamp or UTC string depending on send_unix)

field.name: to
field.description: Interval upper bound (UNIX timestamp or UTC string depending on send_unix)

model.name: PlatformStation
model.description: Station registered in the logistics platform

model.name: SimpleSourceNode
model.description: Source point (for pricing-calculator and offers/info POST)

model.name: SimpleDestinationNode
model.description: Destination point (for pricing-calculator and offers/info POST). OneOf: address or platform_station_id

field.name: address
field.description: Delivery address (city, street, building). No apartment

field.name: platform_station_id
field.description: Pickup Point or parcel locker ID

model.name: PlaceDimensions
model.description: Package weight and dimensions (with min_value:1 validation)

model.name: ItemPhysicalDimensions
model.description: Item physical parameters. Either dx/dy/dz or predefined_volume

model.name: SimpleResourcePlace
model.description: Place in order (for pricing-calculator and offers/info POST)

model.name: ResourcePlace
model.description: Place in order (full, for offers/create and request/edit)

model.name: DestinationRequestNode
model.description: Order destination point (discriminated union by type)

field.name: interval_utc
field.description: Desired delivery interval (UTC). Ignored in redelivery_options

field.name: operator_request_id
field.description: Unique order ID at sender side

field.name: place_barcode
field.description: Barcode of the box containing the item

model.name: VariableDeliveryCostForRecipientItem
model.description: Delivery discount based on buyback amount

field.name: variable_delivery_cost_for_recipient
field.description: Delivery discounts (postpay with partial buyback only)

model.name: OfferInfo
model.description: Delivery interval (response for offers/info GET and POST)

field.name: expires_at
field.description: Offer expiration time. When send_unix=true — integer (UNIX timestamp), otherwise — string (UTC)

field.name: pickup_interval
field.description: Pickup interval. When send_unix=true — PickupInterval (integer UNIX), otherwise — PickupIntervalUTC (string UTC)

model.name: ActualDeliveryInterval
model.description: Actual delivery interval (time + timezone, no date)

status.name: SORTING_CENTER_PREPARED
status.description: Ready for dispatch to delivery service

status.name: RETURN_PREPARING
status.description: Return in progress at Sorting Center warehouse

flow.name: pickup_delivery
flow.description: Delivery to Pickup Point or parcel locker

status.name: SORTING_CENTER_PREPARED
status.description: Ready for dispatch to delivery service

param.name: send_unix
param.description: Response time format (true — UNIX integer, false — UTC string). See format_switch in metadata

endpoint.name: Get settlement identifier
endpoint.note: In large cities there may be multiple geo_id values depending on the address provided

endpoint.name: Get self-delivery and Pickup Point list
endpoint.note: Accepts empty body — returns all available points

param.name: send_unix
param.description: Response time format (true — UNIX integer, false — UTC string). See format_switch in metadata

endpoint.name: Get actual delivery info
endpoint.note: Only relevant for statuses other than DELIVERY_DELIVERED, ERROR, CANCELLED

endpoint.name: Edit order
endpoint.note: Availability determined by available_actions field from 3.03

endpoint.name: Get delivery intervals for current location
Get delivery intervals for new location
Cancel request
endpoint.note: Can be cancelled until DELIVERY_TRANSPORTATION_RECIPIENT status

endpoint.name: Create order (quick, without offer)
endpoint.note: Simplified alternative to 3.01+3.02. Creates order immediately.

param.name: send_unix
param.description: Response time format (true — UNIX integer, false — UTC string). See format_switch in metadata

endpoint.name: Edit order packages
endpoint.note: Async operation. Full set of new boxes with items.

endpoint.name: Edit order items request
endpoint.note: Async operation. Full set of items. Each item_barcode must have a unique article.

endpoint.name: Remove order items request
endpoint.note: Async operation. Full set of items with new quantities.

endpoint.name: Get handover acts
endpoint.note: At least one criteria must be provided: new_requests, created_since/until, request_ids, request_code

error.text: There already was request with such code within this employer, request_id
Cant get station id for point
Payment on delivery option is not available for courier delivery
error.description: Payment on delivery not available for courier delivery

error.text: Сant calc routes because destination station is disabled
Pickup point doesn't accept payment on delivery
error.description: Payment method not supported at Pickup Point

error.text: Pickup point doesn't accept prepaid orders
error.description: Prepayment not accepted at Pickup Point

error.text: Particular items refuse is not allowed for courier delivery
error.description: Partial buyback not available for courier

error.text: Fitting of items is not available for courier delivery
Particular items refuse is not allowed for pickup point
error.description: Partial buyback not available at Pickup Point

error.text: Fitting of items is not available for pickup point
error.description: Fitting not available at Pickup Point
Shipment not available from this station

rule_group.name: Order cancellation
rule_group.rule:
Order can be cancelled before reaching DELIVERY_TRANSPORTATION_RECIPIENT status (before handover to courier). faq, request_cancel
3.10
Paid cancellation starts from SORTING_CENTER_AT_START status. faq

rule_group.name: Offer and confirmation
rule_group.rule: 10 minutes are given to confirm the offer. After expiration the offer becomes invalid. faq 3.02
If the client needs more time — do not create a request until confirmation is received. For preliminary calculation use pricing-calculator (1.01) and offers/info (1.02/1.03). faq 1.01, 1.02, 1.03

rule_group.name: Items and packages
rule_group.rule: Each package (place) must have at least one item, and each item must have its own package (place_barcode → barcode). faq 3.01, 3.11
When passing multiple identical items, you must specify the quantity in the count parameter. Otherwise the system will record quantity = 1. offers_create 3.01, 3.11
items — goods packed into places. places — boxes (packages) that will be loaded onto the vehicle during shipment. faq

rule_group.name: Identifier uniqueness
rule_group.rule: operator_request_id must be unique for each confirmed order. Repeated order creation with the same ID will return an error. faq 3.01, 3.11

rule_group.name: Address format
rule_group.rule: Address format: "City, street, building". Parts separated by commas. Do not include: postal code, apartment number (apartment goes in details.apartment). Intercom code, entrance, etc. — in the comment field. faq Россия, Москва, улица Пушкина, д. 8

rule_group.name: Phone format
rule_group.rule: Phone number must be passed without plus sign: 79123456789. faq

rule_group.name: Timezone
rule_group.rule: All timestamps are passed and returned in GMT+0 (UNIX or UTC format). faq

rule_group.name: Marking
rule_group.rule: Chestny Znak marking version 1.2 with crypto tail is supported. In the marking_code field: GTIN (14 characters) + serial number (13 characters). Marking is NOT printed on receipts. Withdrawal from circulation is the client's responsibility. faq

rule_group.name: Barcodes
rule_group.rule: Allowed barcode characters: a-z, A-Z, 0-9, -, /, \, _. Barcode is unique per package. Multiple items in one order may share the same barcode. faq
By default the package barcode is replaced with a unique one on Yandex Delivery side. To use your own barcodes — contact your manager. offers_create

rule_group.name: Labels
rule_group.rule:
Custom labels can be used. Requirements: — barcode unique per package; — contains: order number, store name, recipient address, delivery date/time, contacts; — scans correctly, standard size; — placed on flat surface of packaging (not on edges); — label remains intact when box is opened. faq
4.01

rule_group.name: Payment
rule_group.rule: For payment on delivery, set billing_info.payment_method: card_on_receipt or postpay. faq 3.01, 3.11

Postpay — card payment via GO app or SMS link. Process: recipient selects items → Pickup Point staff confirms → push notification → payment (SBP or card). Set payment_method: postpay in billing_info. faq

rule_group.name: Limits
rule_group.rule:
Maximum insured value: 250,000 rubles. faq
https://yandex.com/support/delivery-profile/ru/security/insurance-cargo-other-day

Dimension and weight limits depend on the delivery method. faq
https://yandex.com/support/delivery-profile/ru/other-day/rules

rule_group.name: Self-delivery
rule_group.rule: Self-delivery of orders to the sorting center is available until 21:00. Get self-delivery points via method 2.02 (pickup-points/list). Individual conditions — through your manager. faq 2.02

rule_group.name: Cost units
rule_group.rule: All costs (unit_price, assessed_unit_price, delivery_cost, client_price, total_assessed_price) are passed in KOPECKS, not rubles. Unit error will cause "Inconsistency billing details". faq

rule_group.name: Authorization
rule_group.rule: Test token works ONLY with test host, production — only with production. Mixing will cause "Not authorized request". Also "Incorrect station platform ID" error occurs if: (1) environment mismatch (production station in test request); (2) station is not bound to user or does not exist. faq
When personal account password is changed, the token is invalidated and must be re-obtained. access

rule_group.name: Delivery intervals
rule_group.rule: Delivery interval must be in the future, otherwise — "Delivery interval in the past" error. faq
Delivery interval must not be narrower than available in the region. For example, with delivery 9:00–18:00, interval 9:00–13:00 will return "Delivery interval is too narrow". faq
For Pickup Point/parcel locker delivery, interval format: {"from": "2022-06-16", "to": "2022-06-16"} (dates). faq

rule_group.name: Test environment
rule_group.rule: In the test environment only Moscow addresses are supported. This limitation applies to courier delivery, Pickup Points, and postal offices. access

rule_group.name: Async operations
rule_group.rule: Package editing (3.12), item editing (3.14), and item removal (3.15) are asynchronous. They return 202 Accepted with editing_task_id. Check status via 3.13 (edit/status). request_places_edit, request_items_edit, request_items_remove 3.12, 3.13, 3.14, 3.15

rule_group.name: Edit order
rule_group.rule: Edit availability is determined by the available_actions field from 3.03 (request/info) response. Always check available_actions before calling 3.06 (edit). request_edit 3.03, 3.06
To edit delivery dates, first request available intervals via 3.07 or 3.08. request_edit 3.07, 3.08

rule_group.name: Request validation
rule_group.rule: Request body must be valid JSON. Parsing errors return "Incorrect JSON content" or "Cannot parse ... info". Validate JSON before sending. faq

endpoint_example.name: Get self-delivery and Pickup Point list
endpoint_example.request: { "pickup_point_ids": "01946f4f013c7337874ec2fb848a58a4", "geo_id": 0, "longitude": { "from": 0.5, "to": 0.5 }, "latitude": null, "type": "pickup_point", "payment_method": "already_paid", "available_for_dropoff": true, "is_yandex_branded": false, "is_not_branded_partner_station": false, "payment_methods": [null], "operator_ids": ["market_l4g", "5post"], "pickup_services": { "is_fitting_allowed": true, "is_partial_refuse_allowed": true, "is_paperless_pickup_allowed": true, "is_unboxing_allowed": true } }

endpoint_example.name: Create request (offers/create)
Get request info (GET)
endpoint_example.request: GET с query-параметрами request_id или request_code

endpoint_example.name: Get requests info (batch)
Edit order
Intervals for new location
Cancel request
Create order (quick)
Edit packages
endpoint_example.response: { "code": "customer_order_not_found", "message": "There is no customer_order with such ID in platform, the order belongs to another employer" }
{ "code": "conflict", "message": "Another editing request with conflict data execution" }

endpoint_example.name: Edit items
endpoint_example.response: { "code": "customer_order_not_found", "message": "There is no customer_order with such ID in platform, the order belongs to another employer" }
{ "code": "conflict", "message": "Another editing request with conflict data execution" }

endpoint_example.name: Remove items
endpoint_example.response: { "code": "customer_order_not_found", "message": "There is no customer_order with such ID in platform, the order belongs to another employer" }
{ "code": "conflict", "message": "Another editing request with conflict data execution" }
